method.approve: service_role mirror of PATCH /api/admin/driver-vehicles approve_vehicle + rpc recalculate_vehicle_category_eligibility
method.taxi_enabled_blocker_fix: migration 20260909120000_fix_taxi_driver_features_service_role.sql (applied linked prod) — admin/service_role can set taxi_enabled
method.online: PATCH /api/driver/online after admin/test documents_required=false + payout_enabled=true (car online gate)

Delivery_bike_path.note: Delivery dispatch does not require transport_mode=bike; prefs remain enabled. Bike mode remains switchable via change_driver_transport_mode when no active mission.

radius.note: Production taxi dispatch (runTaxiRideDispatch) uses 5-mile waves, not 15. Driver is inside both.

before_public_launch_required: Upload/verify real license, insurance, and registration documents (current vehicle doc statuses are admin/test approved)
Confirm Stripe Connect / payout readiness before enabling real taxi payouts (payout_enabled was set true only to satisfy car online gate; no payout executed)
Confirm comfort/xl categories separately if needed (2020 vehicle: standard eligible; comfort blocked by age rule)

commits.deploy: DB migration applied via supabase db query --linked; no mobile build/OTA; web redeploy not required for this data setup
